title: Fact Check: Trump's Erroneous Claim on Charlotte Stabbing
summary: Trump misstated facts about the suspect in a Charlotte stabbing case, claiming he came through open borders when he was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of verifying information, especially in high-profile cases involving immigration and crime.

title: Hayward: Major Employer in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a swimming pool filter maker based in Charlotte, employs over 1,000 workers in Clemmons, making it the largest private employer there.
charlotte_impact: Showcases the economic significance of manufacturing companies in smaller North Carolina towns.

title: Trade Shows in Charlotte Leverage Canopy Tents
summary: Charlotte trade show exhibitors focus on flexibility, visibility, and ROI by using custom canopy tents to maximize brand presence.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates marketing strategies employed by businesses to enhance brand visibility at local trade events.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a Charlotte-based private equity firm, is seeking a Vice President of Business Development to expand employee ownership.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growth and investment opportunities within the private equity sector in Charlotte.

title: Florence Airport Passenger Numbers Rise Despite Flight Loss
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw increased passenger traffic in 2025 but lost an American Airlines flight to Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the challenges and opportunities faced by regional airports in maintaining and expanding air service.

title: Women Charged in Torture and Death of Girl in NC
summary: Three women in North Carolina are accused of torturing and killing a girl, keeping her in a dog crate at a Charlotte home.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a tragic case of child abuse and the severe consequences of such crimes within the community.

title: Kyle Busch Settles Lawsuit with Pacific Life Insurance
summary: Kyle Busch settled a lawsuit with Pacific Life Insurance over an alleged retirement scheme; details of the settlement remain confidential.
charlotte_impact: Involves a well-known figure and raises questions about financial dealings and legal disputes in the sports world.

title: Sheriff McFadden Plans Next Term After Close Election
summary: Mecklenburg County Sheriff Garry McFadden won re-election with 33.79% of the votes, defeating three challengers in a tight race.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the competitive nature of local elections and the community's choice for law enforcement leadership.

title: Man Charged After Stabbing K-9 in Hickory
summary: Robert Lester, 35, faces charges for assaulting a law enforcement animal and other offenses after stabbing a K-9 in Hickory.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the dangers faced by law enforcement animals and the legal consequences for harming them.

title: Spring Weather Arrives with Record Heat Wave Expected
summary: North Carolina is experiencing spring weather with a record heat wave anticipated, bringing temperatures in the 70s and 80s.
charlotte_impact: Provides information about the changing weather patterns and the potential impact on daily life and activities.

title: Panthers to Play Cardinals in Hall of Fame Game
summary: The Carolina Panthers will face the Arizona Cardinals in the preseason Hall of Fame Game during Luke Kuechly's enshrinement weekend.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a significant event for local sports fans and the recognition of a prominent player in the Pro Football Hall of Fame.

title: New Rebate Program for NC Utility Bills
summary: Energy Saver NC offers financial aid to income-qualified residents struggling with rising utility bills, providing much-needed relief.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the issue of affordability and provides resources for residents facing financial challenges.

title: NC Gas Prices Surge Amid Middle East Conflict
summary: Gas prices in North Carolina have spiked to around $2.99 a gallon due to the Iran conflict and ongoing Middle East strikes.
charlotte_impact: Explains the impact of international events on local economies and the cost of living for residents.

title: Democrat Carla Cunningham Loses NC House Primary
summary: Carla Cunningham, a Democratic incumbent in Mecklenburg County, lost her primary election, marking a shift in local politics.
charlotte_impact: Indicates changes in the political landscape and the outcomes of local elections.

title: Garry McFadden Wins Re-Election Bid
summary: WCNC+ featured the candidates running against Garry McFadden in the primary election prior to his victory.
charlotte_impact: Provides context on the local election and the media coverage surrounding the candidates.
